title: Evaluation Datasets, Hard Negatives, Leakage, and Experiment Design · Program Brief: Rag Query Set Sampling
summary: An evaluation set contains synthetic easy questions generated from the indexed chunks, uses the same examples to tune and test, and has no hard negatives, slices, or versioned judgments. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the query set sampling increment in versioned retrieval and answer test collection. Learne…
objectives: Sample real and designed queries across intents, languages, difficulty, freshness, answerability, access, source types, and harm with documented weights.
Design blinded domain review and user studies that measure decision correctness, time, accessibility, trust calibration, and harm.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-eval-datasets-judgments-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-eval-datasets-judgments-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_eval_datasets_judgments_4(queries: int = 120, assessors: int = 2, hard_negatives: int = 36, leaked_queries: int = 0, agreement: float = 0.78, slices_covered: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if queries <= 0 or assessors < 1 or hard_negatives < 0:
        return False, queries, "dataset-shape"
    if leaked_queries > 0:
        return False, leaked_queries, "evaluation-leakage"
    if agreement < 0.0 or agreement > 1.0:
        return False, 0, "agreement-range"
    if assessors < 2 or slices_covered < 4:
        return False, slices_covered, "judgment-coverage"
    assert hard_negatives < queries
    return True, queries, "versioned-eval-set"

steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Rag Query Set Sampling: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory RAG engineering team handles case 8012 during a multimodal maintenance-manual release. Build deterministic Python evidence to build versioned judgments with hard negatives, slice coverage, agreement, and leakage control; keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects; then double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Sample real and designed queries across intents, languages, difficulty, freshness, answerability, access, source types, and harm with documented weights.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Query Set Sampling model · Theory Rag Query Set Sampling.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Query Set Sampling model · Theory Rag Query Set Sampling, keep Rag Query Set Sampling connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Sample real and designed queries across intents, languages, difficulty, freshness, answerability, access, source types, and harm with documented weights.

hints: For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Query Set Sampling model · Theory Rag Query Set Sampling, name the stakeholder, corpus, source, document, chunk, model, index, query, relevance, tenant, context, citation, evaluation, and transfer boundary, Rag Query Set Sampling precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RAG and Python Defend the Rag Query Set Sampling model · Theory Rag Query Set Sampling, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A theory RAG engineering team handles case 8012 during a multimodal maintenance-manual release. Build deterministic Python evidence to build versioned judgments with hard negatives, slice coverage, agreement, and leakage control; keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects; then double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Sample real and designed queries across intents, languages, difficulty, freshness, answerability, access, source types, and harm with documented weights.

For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Query Set Sampling model · Theory Rag Query Set Sampling, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: A random sample of historical queries automatically covers rare high-harm cases.
